scripts.build: bun run build:core-ts && bun run build:canvas && bun run build:view-rs:web
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/core-ts test && bun run --cwd packages/canvas test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core-ts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/canvas typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/view-rs typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/view-py/web typecheck
